comments.author: chatgpt-codex-connector
comments.body:
Codex usage limits have been reached for code reviews. Please check with the admins of this repo to increase the limits by adding credits.
Credits must be used to enable repository wide code reviews.

comments.author: ZacheryAU
comments.body: the change of `patch.py` is to move the stream PCM parameters collection to a new file. Is it possible to move into or align with `vllm_omni/metrics/definitions.py`? For example, `DEFAULT_AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE = 24000` and `resolve_audio_sample_rate` helper are already defined in `definitions.py`

comments.author: LHXuuu
comments.body:
> the change of `patch.py` is to move the stream PCM parameters collection to a new file. Is it possible to move into or align with `vllm_omni/metrics/definitions.py`? For example, `DEFAULT_AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE = 24000` and `resolve_audio_sample_rate` helper are already defined in `definitions.py`

Good point. Moved the stream PCM env parsing into `vllm_omni/metrics/definitions.py` and reused the existing audio definitions there. `patch.py` now calls `defs.stream_pcm_format_from_env()`, and the extra benchmark-only `audio_format.py` file is removed.
